name: Pizza Tower
author: Poki
description: Pizza Tower is an idle management game that lets you create the best pizza restaurant in town! Start with a humble one-floor shop and build onwards and upwards, boosting your production and collecting different achievements with each level. You can hire managers to assist you in keeping everything running smoothly, and you can also invest into various upgrades to further speed up the process. If you're feeling lucky, you can deposit some of your earnings and play a dice game, which can double your money if you win! Can you raise your pizza empire to the skies? How do I play Pizza Tower? Click with your mouse on the different icons to interact with them and upgrade them. Who created Pizza Tower? Pizza Tower is created by Beedo Games. Play their other games on Poki: Base Defense , Base Defense 2 , Blocky Snakes , Call of Tanks , Chicken Merge , Circuit Master , Clash Of Armour , Clash of Skulls , Clash of Tanks , dark-boy, Idle Cowshed , Idle Gold Miner , Jelly Sokoban , Mafia Wars , Pirate Defense , Pirates Merger , Swingers and Tanko.io ! How can I play Pizza Tower for free? You can play Pizza Tower for free on Poki. Can I play Pizza Tower on mobile devices and desktop? Pizza Tower can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
